stories.title: Hurricanes even the series: Grades, big questions ...
stories.summary: Hurricanes managed to hold off Golden Knights. Here's what it all means.

stories.title: Staal nets wild winner as Hurricanes even series
stories.summary: Jordan Staal scored his second goal of the game while stretched out on his stomach to put the Hurricanes ahead for good in their 5-3 victory over the Golden Knights, evening the Stanley Cup Final at 2-2.

stories.title: Wemby avoids flagrant foul for shoving Brunson
stories.summary: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama will not receive a flagrant foul for his shove to the upper body of Knicks guard Jalen Brunson in Game 3.

stories.title: Messi scores in cameo in front of 88K in Alabama
stories.summary: Argentine legend Messi, who is working his way back from muscle fatigue ahead of the start of the FIFA World Cup, came on in the 70th minute and scored from the penalty spot right after in his team's 3-0 win over Iceland.

stories.title: USWNT gets scrappy win as Brazil sees 8 red cards
stories.summary: Sophia Wilson forced an own goal in the second half for the United States in a scrappy 1-0 win over Brazil in Fortaleza on Tuesday night in which the home side finished with nine players and was shown a total of eight red cards.
